opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: No booking button, no booking tools detected, and phone-only contact confirmed on site.
opportunities.observation: After-hours plumbing leads in Boise cannot book online and likely call a competitor instead.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI-powered 24/7 booking widget to capture emergency and scheduled plumbing appointments automatically.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected and phone-only contact is the sole inbound channel.
opportunities.observation: Every missed or unlogged call represents a permanently lost lead with zero follow-up possible.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call recording and CRM capture to log every caller, intent, and job opportunity.

opportunities.label: Post-Job Follow-Up
opportunities.signal: Only 118 reviews despite operating in two metro areas with no review-request patterns detected.
opportunities.observation: Low review velocity signals no automated post-job touchpoints, leaving referrals and repeat business on the table.
opportunities.fix: Automate SMS follow-ups after each job to request reviews and prompt repeat bookings in Boise.
